title: Japanese Negative Film Window Portrait

imagePrompts.prompt: Japanese negative film aesthetic, quiet summer afternoon, natural candid moment, soft sunlight through window, slight overexposure highlights, low contrast but rich tonal layers, muted and slightly faded colors, gentle warm skin tone, realistic texture without retouching, subtle film grain, a young beautiful japanese girl is sitting casually on floor near window, legs loosely folded, eating ice cream, relaxed unfocused gaze, light curtain moving with breeze, imperfect composition, quiet and distant mood, “memory-like realism”， --ar 2:3

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Japanese negative film aesthetic, quiet summer afternoon, natural candid moment, soft sunlight through window, slight overexposure highlights, low contrast but rich tonal layers, muted and slightly faded colors, gentle warm skin tone, realistic texture without retouching, subtle film grain, a young beautiful japanese girl is sitting casually on floor near window, legs loosely folded, eating ice cream, relaxed unfocused gaze, light curtain moving with breeze, imperfect composition, quiet and distant mood, “memory-like realism”， --ar 2:3

imagePrompts.title: Japanese Negative Film Window Portrait

prompt: Japanese negative film aesthetic, quiet summer afternoon, natural candid moment, soft sunlight through window, slight overexposure highlights, low contrast but rich tonal layers, muted and slightly faded colors, gentle warm skin tone, realistic texture without retouching, subtle film grain, a young beautiful japanese girl is sitting casually on floor near window, legs loosely folded, eating ice cream, relaxed unfocused gaze, light curtain moving with breeze, imperfect composition, quiet and distant mood, “memory-like realism”， --ar 2:3
originalPrompt: Japanese negative film aesthetic, quiet summer afternoon, natural candid moment, soft sunlight through window, slight overexposure highlights, low contrast but rich tonal layers, muted and slightly faded colors, gentle warm skin tone, realistic texture without retouching, subtle film grain, a young beautiful japanese girl is sitting casually on floor near window, legs loosely folded, eating ice cream, relaxed unfocused gaze, light curtain moving with breeze, imperfect composition, quiet and distant mood, “memory-like realism”， --ar 2:3

promptTranslations.zh: 日本负片美学，宁静的夏日午后，自然坦白的时刻，窗外柔和的阳光，轻微过曝的高光，低对比度但色调层次丰富，色彩柔和而略显褪色，温柔温暖的肤色，无需修图的真实质感，微妙的胶片颗粒，年轻美丽的日本女孩随意地坐在窗边的地板上，松松地叠着腿，吃着冰淇淋，目光轻松不焦，光幕随微风而动，不完美的构图，安静而遥远的意境，“记忆般的现实主义”，--ar 2:3
promptTranslations.fr: Esthétique du film négatif japonais, après-midi d'été calme, moment naturel et franc, lumière douce du soleil à travers la fenêtre, légers reflets de surexposition, faible contraste mais couches tonales riches, couleurs sourdes et légèrement fanées, teint doux et chaud, texture réaliste sans retouche, grain de film subtil, une belle jeune fille japonaise est assise nonchalamment sur le sol près de la fenêtre, les jambes lâchement pliées, mangeant de la glace, regard détendu et flou, rideau lumineux se déplaçant avec la brise, composition imparfaite, ambiance calme et distante, « réalisme semblable à celui d'un souvenir » ， --ar 2:3
promptTranslations.ru: Эстетика японской отрицательной плёнки, тихий летний полдень, естественный момент candid, мягкий солнечный свет через окно, лёгкие засвеченные акценты, низкая контрастность с богатой тональной палитрой, приглушённые и слегка выцветшие цвета, нежный тёплый тон кожи, реалистичная текстура без ретуши, тонкий плёночный шум, молодая красивая японская девушка сидит непринуждённо на полу у окна, ноги свободно согнуты, ест мороженое, расслабленный расфокусированный взгляд, лёгкая штора колышется на ветру, несовершенная композиция, тихое и отстранённое настроение, «реализм памяти», --ar 2:3.
promptTranslations.pt: Estética de filme negativo japonês, tarde tranquila de verão, momento natural e sincero, luz solar suave através da janela, leves destaques de superexposição, baixo contraste, mas camadas tonais ricas, cores suaves e levemente desbotadas, tom de pele suave e quente, textura realista sem retoques, grão de filme sutil, uma jovem linda japonesa está sentada casualmente no chão perto da janela, pernas frouxamente dobradas, tomando sorvete, olhar relaxado e desfocado, cortina de luz movendo-se com a brisa, composição imperfeita, humor quieto e distante, “realismo semelhante à memória”, --ar 2:3
promptTranslations.ja: 日本のネガフィルムの美学、静かな夏の午後、自然な率直な瞬間、窓からの柔らかな日差し、わずかな露出オーバーのハイライト、コントラストは低いが豊かな階調レイヤー、落ち着いたわずかに色あせた色、穏やかで温かみのある肌の色合い、レタッチのないリアルな質感、微妙なフィルムグレイン、若い美しい日本の女の子が窓の近くの床に無造作に座っていて、足をゆるく組んで、アイスクリームを食べている、リラックスした焦点の合っていない視線、風に揺れる光のカーテン、不完全な構図、静かで遠い雰囲気、「記憶のようなリアリズム」、 --ar 2:3
promptTranslations.ko: 일본 네거티브 필름 미학, 조용한 여름 오후, 자연스럽고 솔직한 순간, 창문을 통해 들어오는 부드러운 햇빛, 약간의 과다 노출 하이라이트, 낮은 대비이지만 풍부한 톤 레이어, 음소거되고 약간 바랜 색상, 부드럽고 따뜻한 피부 톤, 리터칭 없는 사실적인 질감, 미묘한 필름 그레인, 젊은 아름다운 일본 소녀가 창 근처 바닥에 아무렇지도 않게 앉아 있고, 느슨하게 접힌 다리, 아이스크림을 먹고, 초점이 없는 편안하고 시선, 미풍에 움직이는 라이트 커튼, 불완전한 구성, 조용하고 먼 분위기, “기억과 같은 현실감”, --ar 2:3
